notable_excerpts: The Company unveiled its first electric SUV ‘e Vitara’ at the Bharat Mobility Global Expo 2025.
Built on the new, dedicated ground-up HEARTECT-e platform, the e VITARA offers superior performance and excellent range, with uncompromised comfort and safety.
Maruti Suzuki is present in all technologies, whether it is BEV, HEV or natural gas or bio fuels, flex fuel, all technologies we are present.
e-Vitara is equipped with advanced technology for safety such as 7 airbags as standard across the range, Level 2 ADAS.
We have done high voltage courses for our service mechanics.
We are also preparing 1,500 EV enabled service workshops covering over 1,000 cities with specially trained manpower.
Industry body SIAM is in discussion with the government on this.
We may be making some forward-looking statements that have to be understood in conjunction with uncertainty and the risk that the Company faces.
The con call will begin with a “Brief Statement on the Performance and Outlook of a Business by the Chief Investor Relations Officer.

chain_of_thought: The earnings call highlighted Maruti Suzuki's focus on electric vehicles and renewable energy technologies, reflecting a strong environmental commitment. Social aspects were addressed through safety features and employee training initiatives. Governance was discussed in terms of risk management and transparency, though specifics were less detailed.
strengths: Strong focus on electric vehicle development and infrastructure.
Comprehensive safety features in new models.
weaknesses: Lack of specific details on governance practices.
Limited discussion on diversity and inclusion.
red_flags: Uncertainty around CAFE 3 norms and their impact.
